headline: 3 Reasons MAR is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Since April 2021, the S&P 500 has delivered a total return of 60.2%. But one standout stock has more than doubled the market - over the past five years, Marriott has surged 134% to $348.15 per share. Its momentum hasn’t stopped as it’s also gained 30.8% in the last six months, beating the S&P by 32.6%.

headline: Why Are Hotel Stocks Hyatt and Marriott Up on 2-Week Ceasefire News?
summary: Hyatt and Marriott shares rallied on the U.S.-Iran ceasefire announcement as lower energy costs and geopolitical stability support the hospitality industry’s operating margins and demand outlook.

raw.headline: Why Are Hotel Stocks Hyatt and Marriott Up on 2-Week Ceasefire News?
raw.summary: Hyatt and Marriott shares rallied on the U.S.-Iran ceasefire announcement as lower energy costs and geopolitical stability support the hospitality industry’s operating margins and demand outlook.

headline: Coca-Cola’s Marriott Win Puts Hotel Reach And Valuation In Focus
summary: Coca-Cola has replaced Pepsi as Marriott International's global beverage provider. The multi year agreement covers nearly 9,700 hotels worldwide across Marriott's portfolio. The partnership gives Coca-Cola exposure to millions of hotel guests around the world. Coca-Cola (NYSE: KO) is entering this new agreement with Marriott from a position of scale and brand recognition, supported by a broad beverage portfolio. The shares recently closed at $77.29, with a return of 11.8% year to date and...

headline: Coury Hospitality to manage Hotel Cleveland, Autograph Collection
summary: The Ohio hotel, which recently underwent a $90 million renovation, fortifies the lifestyle hospitality management company’s U.S. portfolio with another Marriott-branded property.
